data.title: Inventor from Fowlerville, Mich., develops THE BLOCK SADDLE for rebar in concrete. Patent number KSG-135.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 24, 2025, an inventor from Fowlerville, Michigan, shared a breakthrough in construction innovation. The inventor introduced THE BLOCK SADDLE, a solution aimed at securely holding a section of rebar in place within concrete that is poured into a block or form. The inventor expressed the idea to enhance efficiency and precision in construction processes. This invention is designed to keep the rebar properly centered during the pouring process, providing a more reliable and sturdy framework.

data.title: Nvidia and AI chipmakers expected to benefit from Google's capex boost and Trump's AI Action Plan, analysts predict.
data.description: According to analysts, the recent AI Action Plan introduced by the Trump administration along with Google's significant rise in data center spending are expected to positively impact Nvidia and other AI chip stocks. This move is set to provide a boost to these companies as they align their strategies with the increasing demand for artificial intelligence technologies. The surge in Google's capital expenditure in data centers, combined with the government's support for AI initiatives, is seen as a driving force behind this upward trend in the market. Investors and industry experts anticipate this shift to generate substantial growth opportunities for Nvidia and other players in the AI semiconductor sector.

data.title: AI stock fell after software maker C3.ai CEO Thomas Siebel announced resignation for health reasons.
data.description: On Thursday, AI stock experienced a decline following the announcement from software company C3.ai that their CEO, Thomas Siebel, will be stepping down due to health reasons. This news caused a drop in the stock value. This change in leadership was revealed in a report by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: 10x Genomics stock gets RS rating upgrade, showing improved technical performance. Will it continue rising?
data.description: 10x Genomics has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating an improvement in its technical performance. Investors are now wondering if this positive trend will persist. This notable upgrade comes at a crucial time for the company, with a growing focus on its stock performance. With the upgrade in place, 10x Genomics is poised to attract more attention from investors looking for potential growth opportunities in the market. The post highlighting the stock's status can be found on Investor's Business Daily, offering further insights into this notable development.

data.title: OP price holds steady at $0.71, up 1.43%, amid uncertainty over 31M token unlock on July 31st. Whale accumulation drives mixed signals.
data.description: The stock of OP is currently trading at $0.71, showing a daily increase of 1.43%. The market is experiencing mixed signals due to a scenario where whale accumulation is conflicting with an anticipated release of 31 million tokens on July 31st. This situation has raised concerns among investors.

data.title: Corpay to divest a fuel card portfolio, expected to gain $60M and free up $35M in working capital for new acquisitions.
data.description: Atlanta-based company Corpay, Inc. (NYSE: CPAY) has revealed its decision to sell off a lower growth private label fuel card portfolio from its legacy assets. The divestiture is projected to generate around $60 million in revenue for Corpay and release about $35 million in working capital. The company intends to channel these funds towards its acquisition of Alpha Group International plc. This move aligns with Corpay's strategy to adjust its portfolio towards.

data.title: AstraZeneca's Phase 3 trial for myasthenia gravis drug (gefurulimab) shows success in 260 patients, meeting primary and secondary endpoints. JPJ and Amgen may face competition.
data.description: AstraZeneca Plc provided an update on Thursday regarding the PREVAIL Phase 3 trial of gefurulimab for generalized myasthenia gravis (gMG). The study included 260 adult participants. gMG is a chronic autoimmune disease leading to muscle weakness and fatigue due to antibodies targeting the acetylcholine receptor on nerve cells crucial for muscle function. In adults with anti-acetylcholine receptor (AChR) antibody-positive (Ab+) gMG, gefurulimab achieved its primary and all secondary endpoints successfully. For more details, please refer to Benzinga.com.

data.description: According to recent reports, the global carbon dioxide emissions have reached an all-time high of over 40 billion tons in the last year. This marks an increase of 2.5% compared to the previous year. The rise in emissions is primarily attributed to the increased use of fossil fuels and the lack of significant progress in transitioning to renewable energy sources. This alarming trend highlights the urgent need for more aggressive actions to combat climate change and reduce greenhouse gas emissions worldwide.Experts warn that if current trends continue, the world is at risk of facing irreversible damage to the environment and exacerbating the effects of global warming. Efforts to curb carbon emissions and shift towards sustainable energy alternatives are crucial in mitigating the impact of climate change and safeguarding the future of the planet.

data.title: Content-native prediction markets by Myriad engage readers as active participants by embedding on-chain markets in media content.
data.description: Myriad is revolutionizing audience engagement by incorporating prediction markets on the blockchain into media content, enabling readers to actively participate.

data.title: Denver impresses site inspectors in bid to host 2030 Gay Games, boosting chances of winning bid.
data.description: Denver made significant progress in its bid to host the 2030 International Gay Games as it impressed site inspectors with a series of events throughout the week. The events took place in Denver from July 24, 2025. The city showcased its capabilities with the support of local and state authorities, alongside community leaders and LGBTQIA2S+ organizations. This effort aimed to secure the hosting rights for the prestigious event and involved a variety of successful activities.

data.title: Twilio named Leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for CPaaS for third year in row, known for real-time customer engagement.
data.description: In San Francisco, Twilio (NYSE: TWLO) has been named a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Communications Platform as a Service (CPaaS) for the third year in a row. This recognition is based on the assessment of their CPaaS platform's capabilities, focusing on the company's completeness of vision and ability to execute. Twilio is known for providing real-time, personalized customer engagement experiences for top brands.

data.title: The Knot Worldwide launches new products for wedding professionals on WeddingPro to boost visibility, with AI advancements and inbox tools.
data.description: A major global marketplace and family of brands promoting celebrations, The Knot Worldwide, shared significant updates for wedding professionals advertising on The Knot and WeddingWire. The enhancements include new badges for storefronts to attract couples, as well as AI improvements and inbox tools for increased efficiency. These features on WeddingPro aim to boost vendor visibility, enhance performance, and facilitate better connections with more couples.

data.title: Pumpkin introduces PumpkinNow™, allowing pet insurance claims to be paid in just 2 minutes, making it one of the fastest in the U.S.
data.description: New in the pet insurance industry as of July 24, 2025, Pumpkin has introduced a rapid payment service known as PumpkinNow™ for its customers. This innovative solution has positioned Pumpkin as one of the swiftest pet insurance providers in the United States. With PumpkinNow™, customers can expect lightning-fast payments, significantly reducing the waiting time for claims processing. This service enhancement aims to streamline the insurance experience and enhance customer satisfaction, solidifying Pumpkin's reputation in the market.
